title: Beginner's Guide to Business Presentations and PowerPoint
description:
This course features Coursera Coach!

A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

This course is designed to equip you with the essential skills to craft and deliver effective business presentations using PowerPoint. You will learn how to structure your presentations with purpose, connect with your audience through storytelling, and use visuals strategically to enhance communication. Each module helps you build confidence, develop your presentation delivery, and integrate feedback from real-time interactions.

Starting with the foundational concepts, the course will guide you step by step through the process of creating a business presentation, from message crafting and planning to delivery. You’ll learn how to focus on audience-first strategies and refine your speaking skills. Along the way, you'll explore ways to use PowerPoint effectively for impactful visuals, ensuring your message is clear and memorable.

Throughout the course, you’ll have the opportunity to engage in hands-on practice and community feedback, helping you fine-tune your presentations. By leveraging interactive exercises and video recordings, you’ll gain valuable insights into your strengths and areas for improvement. This journey provides a comprehensive pathway to mastering business presentations.

This course is ideal for professionals who are new to business presentations and looking to gain confidence in their communication. It’s also perfect for students, interns, and entrepreneurs who need to present their ideas effectively in meetings, pitches, or professional settings. 

By the end of the course, you will be able to plan, design, and deliver powerful business presentations, engage your audience with compelling storytelling, create impactful PowerPoint slides, and speak confidently and authentically.
